description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa with a boxy, geometric silhouette and a deep charcoal gray color. The sofa features straight, thick armrests that are the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform, monolithic appearance. The seat and back cushions are seamlessly integrated into the frame, giving the sofa a minimalist and contemporary look without visible seams or tufting. The upholstery has a subtle mottled texture, suggesting a soft, matte fabric or faux leather finish. The sofa stands on four short, blocky legs, likely made of wood, which are only slightly visible beneath the base. Its overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for urban public spaces or modern residential settings.
description: A compact, boxy modern sofa in dark gray with integrated cushions and straight, thick armrests. The upholstery has a subtle mottled texture and the sofa stands on four short block legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, straight backrest, and thick armrests, all in a uniform dark gray with a mottled texture.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's deep seat, the straight profile of the backrest and armrest, and the short block leg at the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, unadorned backrest and the two visible block legs at the corners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the straight armrest, deep seat, and block leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and back cushions are fully attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, straight, and boxy, matching the height of the backrest and seat, with no decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, likely made of wood with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation, tufting, or visible cushion separation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray with a subtle mottled texture, no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
